dsl_rule.translation_notes: This is a regime identification signal, not a directional entry signal. It classifies market conditions based on price direction (close vs prev_close) and volume direction (volume vs prev_volume). The 9 entry conditions represent the 3x3 matrix of price/volume combinations. Entry logic uses AND to detect clear regime shifts. Exit logic reverses to detect regime change. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since the signal determines whether to trade long or short based on identified regime.

backtest_rule.reason: This is a regime identification signal, not a directional entry signal. It classifies market conditions based on price direction (close vs prev_close) and volume direction (volume vs prev_volume). The 9 entry conditions represent the 3x3 matrix of price/volume combinations. Entry logic uses AND to detect clear regime shifts. Exit logic reverses to detect regime change. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since the signal determines whether to trade long or short based on identified regime.

source_rule_text: Identify market regime (uptrend, downtrend, or sideways) by analyzing the combination of price direction and volume direction to determine accumulation, distribution, or trend strength.
